name: matlab-formatter-plus
description: A modified edition of AffenWiesel/matlab-formatter-vscode with improved block alignment and blank-line control features

matlab-formatter-plus.indentwidth.description: number of spaces used for indentation

matlab-formatter-plus.separateBlocks.description: Legacy master switch for block blank-line formatting. Keep enabled to use the detailed block blank-line options below.

matlab-formatter-plus.insertBlankLineBef.description: Insert a blank line before block starts such as if, for, while, try, switch, methods, properties, events, arguments and enumeration.

matlab-formatter-plus.insertBlankLineAft.description: Insert a blank line after block endings such as end, endif, endfor and endswitch.

matlab-formatter-plus.allowBlankLineBetw.description: Allow a blank line between consecutive block starts such as nested for/if blocks. Disable this to keep nested blocks compact.
Allow a blank line between consecutive block endings such as nested end/end pairs. Disable this to keep nested block endings compact.

enumDescriptions: Add indentation inside all functions and classdefs
Only add indentation inside nested functions and class-methods
No indentation of functions and classes (not recommended)
Wrap all operators with spaces, except ^ and .^
Don't wrap any operators with spaces. (not recommended)
Keep rows of a matrix aligned.

matlab-formatter-plus.squeezeBlankAfterC.description: Force-remove blank lines right after control blocks such as if, for, while, try, switch, methods, properties, events, arguments and enumeration.

matlab-formatter-plus.squeezeBlankAfterF.description: Force-remove blank lines right after function and classdef declarations.

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const { formatText }=require('./formatter/matlab_formatter'); const input=fs.readFileSync('./formatter/test.m','utf8'); formatText(input,{ startLine: 1, endLine: 999999 }); console.log('formatter ok');"
